column3: "Dong Quai reduces hot flashes" refers to its use in relieving the unpleasant heat and sweating associated with menopause.
"Dong Quai improves blood circulation" refers to its ability to enhance the flow of blood throughout the body, thereby boosting overall health and vitality.
"Dong Quai boosts bone density" refers to its ability to improve bone health by increasing calcium absorption, potentially aiding in preventing or slowing down osteoporosis.
"Dong Quai fights cancer cells" refers to its ability to potentially inhibit the growth of malignant tumors, though more research is needed for conclusive evidence.
"Dong Quai improves digestion" refers to its ability to enhance the body's capability to break down and absorb nutrients from food efficiently.
"Dong Quai relieves menstrual cramps" refers to its effectiveness in reducing pain and discomfort experienced during a woman's monthly cycle.
"Dong Quai lowers cholesterol levels" refers to its ability to improve circulation, balance hormones and control blood sugar, indirectly supporting healthy cholesterol levels in the body.

"Dong Quai reduces stress and anxiety" refers to its ability of combatting mental tension and emotional unease, offering relief to individuals dealing with various life struggles and difficulties that would have otherwise caused them stress or anxiety.
"Dong Quai enhances skin elasticity" refers to its ability to improve the texture, resilience, and suppleness of the skin by promoting collagen production, leading to a more youthful appearance.
"Dong Quai reduces blood pressure" refers to its ability as an herbal remedy that helps in regulating high blood pressure levels.
